params.name: Aurelius on Horse
params.description: This bronze statue is a tribute to the Roman Emperor and philosopher Marcus Aurelius. The statue depicts Aurelius in military attire, with his right hand raised, mounted on a warhorse. Unlike a posture that displays military glory, his expression is thoughtful, revealing a profound philosophical essence, reflecting his identity as a Stoic philosopher. The statue has weathered many changes over time; it was once mistakenly identified as a statue of Emperor Constantine and had been altered in colo …
